name: NYX Professional Makeup Matte Finish Setting Spray
tagline: Lock your look all day with a shine-free matte finish
description: A lightweight, water-based setting spray that keeps makeup exactly where you put it. Protects against sweat, humidity and daily wear while leaving a polished, shine-free matte finish — the final step in every long-wear routine. Vegan formula.
how_to_use: Shake well, hold 10–15 cm from the face and mist evenly over finished makeup. Let air-dry — don't touch until set.
supplier_notes: Authentic, EU-notified. Lyko SE 149 kr (RRP 159 kr). Also KICKS/Apohem. In stock, ships immediately.

name: NYX Professional Makeup The Brow Glue Instant Brow Styler
tagline: The viral laminated-brow gel with up to 16h extreme hold
description: The internet-famous brow glue that lifts, shapes and locks every hair in place for up to 16 hours — no flaking, no stickiness once dry. Brush up for the laminated soap-brow look that frames your whole face. Vegan formula.
how_to_use: Brush through brows with the spoolie in upward, lifted strokes. For a laminated look, press hairs flat in the same direction and let set.
supplier_notes: Authentic, EU-notified. Lyko 162 kr (RRP 169 kr). Transparent + tinted shades in stock.

name: NYX Professional Makeup Ultimate Shadow Palette
tagline: 16 pro-curated warm neutrals — mattes, shimmers and metallics
description: Sixteen true-to-pan shades in one slim palette: rich mattes, glowing shimmers and bold metallics curated by pro artists in LA. One-swipe pigment for everything from soft everyday looks to full-glam evenings. Vegan formula, palette made with 30% recycled materials.
how_to_use: Sweep a matte base shade over the lid, deepen the crease, then press a shimmer or metallic on the center of the lid. Blend and build as you like.
supplier_notes: Authentic, EU-notified. Lyko SE 299 kr (RRP 309 kr), Lyko DK 205 dkr. In stock, ships immediately.

name: e.l.f. Brow Lift
tagline: Extreme-hold clear wax for the fluffy soap-brow look
description: The cult clear shaping wax that lifts, tames and sculpts brows into the feathered soap-brow look — all-day extreme hold with a natural finish that works on every brow colour. Conditioning formula nourishes hairs while it holds. 100% vegan and cruelty-free.
how_to_use: Dip a spoolie into the wax and brush brow hairs upward and outward. Press flat with a spatula edge for a laminated finish; let dry 60 seconds.
supplier_notes: Authentic, EU-notified. Lyko 99 kr. In stock, ships immediately.

name: essence Juicy Bomb Shiny Lipgloss
description: The bestselling juicy gloss with a deliciously fruity scent and an ultra-glossy, non-sticky finish. Sweet almond and castor oil keep lips soft while the slanted applicator makes one-swipe shine effortless. Clean beauty formula in a 90% recyclable tube.
how_to_use: Glide over bare lips for a juicy everyday look, or layer on top of lipstick for extra shine.
supplier_notes: Authentic, EU-notified. Lyko 20 kr per shade — excellent margin. All shades in stock.

name: essence I Love Extreme Crazy Volume Mascara
tagline: Mega volume in one coat with the extra-large brush
description: Extreme volume for lash lovers: ultra-black pigments coat every single lash while the extra-large elastomer brush builds dramatic, overwhelming volume from the first stroke. Vegan, cruelty-free and free from parabens and fragrance.
how_to_use: Wiggle the brush at the lash root and pull through to the tips. Build a second coat before the first one dries for maximum drama.
supplier_notes: Authentic, EU-notified. Lyko 40 kr — strong margin. In stock, ships immediately.

name: Maybelline SuperStay Matte Ink Liquid Lipstick
tagline: Up to 16h of saturated, transfer-proof matte colour
description: The iconic liquid lipstick that outlasts everything: up to 16 hours of intensely saturated matte colour that won't smudge, transfer or fade through eating, drinking or kissing. The unique arrow applicator gives a precise, one-swipe finish.
how_to_use: Start at the cupid's bow using the arrow tip for precision, then fill the lips in one swipe. Let dry completely — then forget about it all day.
supplier_notes: Authentic, EU-notified. Cosmetis 150 kr, KICKS 159 kr (in stock), Cocopanda 148 kr. Some shades discontinued at Lyko — stick to core shades Pioneer/Lover/Seductress.
